admission.headline: Admissions Are Open
admission.sub: Enroll your child today and give them the future they deserve.

creche.title: Crèche Section
creche.description: Our crèche is beautifully designed and equipped to cater for the needs of infants and toddlers between the ages of three to twenty-three months.

nursery.title: Nursery Section
nursery.description: We pride ourselves in being able to provide personalised learning experience organised to suit the development of each child.

primary.title: Primary Section
primary.description: Our curriculum enables children to excel in Mathematics, English Language, Arts, Drama, Music and Sports.

secondary.title: Secondary Section
secondary.description: Gran Hermano Academy Junior and Secondary school is best known for its exceptionally caring atmosphere.

about.title: Welcome To Gran Hermano Academy
about.body: Gran Hermano Academy is a co-educational boarding institution, consisting of nursery, primary and senior secondary school children between the ages of 2–16 years. It was founded to provide a balanced, comprehensive educational curriculum for the full development of children intellectually, spiritually and socially.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Gran Hermano Academy
whyChoose.subtitle: At GHA, our goal is to model and equip great minds and maximise their potential to face the ever-dynamic world.

items.title: Learning by Discovery
items.description: At GHA, students learn through making discoveries and practical involvement that enhances critical thinking and independent learning.

items.title: Intellectual Competence
items.description: With a student-centred approach and state-of-the-art facilities, GHA is an academic fortress where students reach their highest potential.

items.title: Skilled Teachers
items.description: Every staff member comes with an excellent track record, challenging our students to be the very best in every endeavour.

items.title: Secured & Safe Environment
items.description: Our campus is fully secured with round-the-clock supervision, CCTV coverage and professional security personnel.

items.title: Conducive Learning & Library
items.description: Our library and learning spaces are designed for focused, inspired study and independent research.

items.title: Standard Sports Centres
items.description: Our sports facilities nurture physical fitness, teamwork, discipline, and a healthy competitive spirit.

items.title: Air-Conditioned Classrooms
items.description: Every classroom is air-conditioned and equipped with modern teaching aids, ensuring students remain comfortable and focused.

items.title: Modern School Buses
items.description: Our fleet of modern, air-conditioned school buses ensures safe and comfortable transportation every school day.

facilities.title: Library
facilities.description: Our school library is a quiet and well-organised learning space stocked with textbooks, reference materials, storybooks and digital resources.

facilities.title: Playground
facilities.description: Our playground is a safe and lively environment where students relax, play, and develop physical fitness and teamwork.

facilities.title: ICT Laboratory
facilities.description: Our ICT Lab is a digital learning hub designed to prepare students for the digital economy.

facilities.title: Modern Classrooms
facilities.description: Our classrooms provide a comfortable, well-organised learning environment with quality furniture and learning materials.

facilities.title: Biology Laboratory
facilities.description: Our biology laboratory is well equipped with modern facilities to facilitate the practical aspect of the subject.

facilities.title: Physics Laboratory
facilities.description: Our Physics laboratory has a very conducive atmosphere for performing experiments with maximum engagement.

facilities.title: Chemistry Laboratory
facilities.description: Cambridge-certified with modern equipment including fume cupboard, water distillation chamber, and Kipp's apparatus.

anthem.verse1:
All hail, Gran Hermano
My school, my pride
My alma mater
For you will blossom in wisdom
To achieve excellence
Springing leadership
GHA, G.H.A, G.H.A
We are great
We are great
anthem.verse2:
Arise, Gran Hermano
Shine forth with light
That never goes dim
Shining to the hills and valleys
Molding, restructuring
Future generation
G.H.A, G.H.A., G.H.A.
We are great
We are great

vision.text: To be a top-class school for the pursuit of excellence in knowledge as well as character and service to humanity.
vision.mission: To provide a conducive teaching environment, learning and character based on the fear of God and hard work. To develop a child completely — body, mind and soul — so as to attain excellence in all ramifications of life.

coreValues.name: Excellence
coreValues.desc: Excellent teaching is our passion. Teachers are highly committed to their work and assist pupils and students to achieve their potentials.

coreValues.name: Respect
coreValues.desc: We care for others and treat them with courtesy. Mutual respect is the foundation of our community.

coreValues.name: Responsibility
coreValues.desc: We nurture our pupils and students to be independent and great leaders of tomorrow.

coreValues.name: Integrity
coreValues.desc: We are strongly committed and sincere in all our dealings with pupils, students and parents.

news.title: GHA Annual Thanksgiving Service
news.excerpt: We cordially invite all parents and guardians to the 12th Annual Thanksgiving Service of our dear school.
news.content: Dear Parents/Guardians, We wish to cordially invite you to the 12th Annual Thanksgiving service of our dear school. Date: Sunday, 7th December, 2025. Time: 9:30a.m. prompt. Venue: St. Thomas Aquinas Catholic Church, behind old Govt House, Agu-Awka.
news.author: GHA ICT

news.title: First Term Examination Ongoing
news.excerpt: First Term Examination for the 2025/2026 Academic Session is currently ongoing.
news.content: First Term Examination for 2025/2026 Academic Session is ongoing. Students are expected to arrive early and come with all necessary exam materials.
news.author: GHA ICT
